verdicts.missing: Pasting bills or placards onto walls or billboards is reduced to words touching an unspecified thing.
verdicts.reason: It has a public-visible textual result but does not adequately identify the posted material or the posting action and surface.

verdicts.missing: It omits bills or placards and walls or billboards, carrying only an unspecified object touching another object.
verdicts.reason: This is a generic action with an unrelated contact state and could describe innumerable occupations.
It identifies a person who causes a word-bearing item to be attached to a large support so many people can see it, capturing the posting function.

verdicts.missing: It omits the bill or placard and the wall or billboard, carrying only an unspecified object in contact with something.
verdicts.reason: The bare action and contact relation are far too generic to pick out a bill poster.
It renders manual attachment of word-bearing materials to a surface for broad public viewing, which captures the relevant occupational activity.

verdicts.missing: It does not make the person's action one of pasting a bill or placard onto a wall or billboard.
verdicts.reason: A word-bearing thing touching a place is compatible with many activities and lacks the requisite affixing relation.

verdicts.missing: It does not connect the person's action to attaching the word-bearing item to the large surface.
verdicts.reason: Although it describes a visible textual item on a large thing, the worker's unspecified action need not be posting it.
